rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §21.0485 governs educator certification for teaching students with visual impairments. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 21.0485. CERTIFICATION TO TEACH STUDENTS WITH VISUAL IMPAIRMENTS.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this educator certification statute.
